title: WhatsApp ADB Send Message
description: Send a WhatsApp message via ADB on Rayssa's phone (RQCX907KFTK). Six steps: screenshot to check inbound, evaluate, tap input, type text, press Enter, screenshot to verify delivery.
notes: This is the FALLBACK lane. Once MQTT or SSH relay is live, use direct machine-to-machine messaging instead. ADB phone lane becomes Falcon-only.

steps.note: Step 1: Screenshot FIRST to check for new inbound messages before typing.
Step 2: Read the screenshot. If there is a new inbound message, STOP and process it before sending. If no new message, proceed to Step 3.
Step 3: Tap message input field (bottom center of WhatsApp conversation).
Step 4: Type message text. Use %s for spaces. Avoid special chars (parentheses, em-dash, quotes, curly braces). Max ~500 chars per ADB input to avoid truncation.
Step 5: Press Enter to SEND. keyevent 66 = KEYCODE_ENTER.
Step 6: Screenshot AFTER send to verify message was delivered (double checkmarks). ALWAYS take this screenshot — never skip verification.
